task_completion.visual_evidence: The Gretl main window should be visible with 'food.gdt' loaded, showing variables such as 'food_exp' and 'income' in the variable list.

task_completion.description: Perform an OLS regression with 'food_exp' as the dependent variable and 'income' as the independent variable
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Gretl model window should be open displaying the results of an OLS regression where 'food_exp' is the dependent variable and 'income' (along with 'const') are the independent variables.

task_completion.description: Configure a joint linear hypothesis test for const=80 and income=10
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Linear restrictions' dialog box or similar Gretl window should be visible, showing the restrictions being entered (e.g., 'b[const]=80' and 'b[income]=10').

task_completion.description: Execute the joint hypothesis test and display the results
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Gretl output window should display the results of the linear restriction test, explicitly showing the restrictions tested, an F-statistic, and a p-value.

task_completion.description: Save the full test results to the specified text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or text editor should show the test results being saved to or existing at '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/joint_test_results.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Gretl GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Gretl's graphical interface (menus, dialog boxes, model windows) rather than just executing a pre-written script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The test results are genuinely generated by Gretl
integrity.visual_evidence: The hypothesis test results should appear in a standard Gretl output window with correct formatting before being saved to the text file.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type fake results into the text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen copying from the Gretl output window or using Gretl's save functionality, rather than typing numbers directly into a text editor from scratch.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dataset: food.gdt. Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/joint_test_results.txt. The agent must perform an OLS regression (food_exp on income) and a joint linear hypothesis test (const=80, income=10). The final text file must contain the genuine Gretl output for this specific test, including the F-statistic and p-value. A dynamic ground truth file is generated at /var/lib/gretl/ground_truth_test.txt for backend evaluation, but visually you must confirm the correct variables and restrictions were used in the Gretl GUI.
